race.comment: MCLOVIN (1) finished fourth two runs back at Townsville then improved last time out to score by a neck after being in the firing line on the corner over 1250m at this track. Likely to be there at the finish again. DOWN THE KOOKA (12) was below his best last time, finishing seventh and beaten 6 lengths over 1250m at this circuit. Likely improver with top-three prospects. TIPPED OFF (6) found the line nicely last start to get up for second over 1250m at this venue. One for the exotics players. FLORAL LEGEND (11) handles all going and should give backers a sight up on speed from the favourable draw.
